title: Bongus
description: Bongus! is an RPG Vanilla+ modded multiplayer pack with lots of new custom content!
body:
A modpack running Fabric 1.19.2


### Performance :
For running `Bongus!` I recommend `6-7GB of RAM`, there are many performance enhancing mods such as Sodium, Lithium, Phosphor, & More.

### Mods / Focus
` Bongus!` is focused on `exploration`, `combat`, and `RPG` mechanics. With the help of mods like Levelz, When Dungeons Arise, & EnvironmentZ. However we also offer a large quantity of mods for `builders` with lots of furniture and blocks!

### Miscellaneous
`Bongus!` is my 2nd mod pack and my 1st one on Modrinth so if you have any criticism please feel free to let me know!
